query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products FROM products;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count FROM products GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products FROM products;
